_comment: mdvs Claude Code hook config. Generated by `mdvs scaffold hook --platform claude-code`. Merge into your existing .claude/settings.json under the `hooks` key. The validate.sh path is relative to the project root; adjust if you install it elsewhere. The search-nudge's `*kb/*` pattern scopes the tip to your KB directory — change `kb` to match the path you actually use (e.g. `notes`, `wiki`, `docs`).

hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in *kb/*) case "$cmd" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ag\ *|*ack\ *|*"git grep"*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Tip: `mdvs search` is also available for semantic / hybrid / SQL-filtered search over the KB."}}' ;; esac ;; esac
